channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pioneering Women Officers Who Broke Barriers in Indian Army
item.description: On the eve of International Women's Day, The Times of India highlighted the remarkable journeys of Lt Col Ravinder Jit Randhawa (retd) and Major Priya Jhingan (retd), two women who reshaped the Indian...

item.title: Water Sector Anti-Corruption Forum Established to Protect National Water Resources
item.description: The Special Investigating Unit (SIU) and the Department of Water and Sanitation (DWS) have launched the Water Sector Anti-Corruption Forum (WSACF) to strengthen efforts against corruption and safeguar...

item.title: Reflecting on the true character and shared values of Kenya
item.description: This opinion piece reflects on the deep question of what really makes up Kenya’s national soul as a country and a people. The writer looks beyond the usual symbols like the flag, the national anthem, ...

item.title: UP Diliman Choral Conductor Under Investigation for Alleged Sexual Misconduct
item.description: The University of the Philippines Diliman is currently dealing with allegations of sexual abuse involving one of its choral conductors. The conductor, who is affiliated with a prominent university cho...

item.title: Developments in US-Iran conflict as strikes hit Middle East cities and Dubai airport partially resumes operations
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran has intensified, with multiple strikes reported across the Middle East. Israeli airstrikes have targeted Tehran and Beirut, killing hundreds, whil...

item.title: Ongoing US and Israel strikes in Iran as Gulf states face drone attacks
item.description: As the war between US and Israel against Iran enter day nine, the situation dey escalate serious. Casualties dey rise, with over 1,300 confirmed dead mostly for Iran side. Even after Iran apologize to...

item.title: Daily Horoscope Insights for March 8, 2026
item.description: This horoscope provides guidance for all zodiac signs on March 8, 2026, highlighting personal growth, financial opportunities, and emotional well-being. Individuals celebrating birthdays are encourage...

item.title: Nigerian Army Successfully Defends Borno Communities from Boko Haram Night Attacks
item.description: The Nigerian Army don talk say some media wey yan say 40 soldiers die for recent Boko Haram attacks for Borno dey exaggerate. Lieutenant Colonel Sani Uba, wey be media officer for Joint Task Force Nor...

item.title: Ahmedabad Authorities Announce Traffic Restrictions and Alternate Routes for T20 World Cup Final
item.description: Ahead of the highly anticipated ICC Men’s T20 World Cup 2026 final at Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad, the city traffic authorities have issued an important advisory for commuters. Due to expected ...

item.title: EAC Seeks AU Support to Address Conflicts in Eastern DRC
item.description: The East African Community (EAC) has escalated its peace and security efforts to the continental level by engaging the African Union (AU) to help address persistent conflicts, especially in eastern De...

item.title: Britain's conflicted approach to remembering the COVID-19 pandemic amid the new national day of reflection
item.description: The article explores Britain's complex and ambivalent relationship with commemorating the COVID-19 pandemic, as the government designates 8 March as a national Day of Reflection, led by the Department...

item.title: Coles rejects claims over unpaid security guards from MA Services
item.description: Coles has rejected claims from Victoria’s labour hire regulator suggesting it was aware that security guards supplied by MA Services, a now-defunct and corrupt security company, would not receive thei...

item.title: UNIPORT Professor Urges Establishment of National Forensic Data Bank to Strengthen Crime Investigation in Nigeria

item.title: Federal Funding Uncertainty Disrupts State Public Health Programs Despite Later Restorations
item.description: Since early 2025, the federal government has suspended several large public health grants to states, only to restore them after legal challenges and court interventions. A notable example occurred on ...

item.title: Explosions reported outside US embassies in Oslo and Baghdad amid escalating Iran conflict
item.description: On the night of 7-8 March 2026, an explosion occurred outside the US Embassy in Oslo, Norway, at approximately 1am local time, causing minor damage to the consular entrance and resulting in minor inju...

item.title: Australian Grand Prix 2026: Key Developments and Race Updates in Melbourne
item.description: The 2026 Australian Grand Prix saw an eventful start to the Formula 1 season, as unprecedented rule changes were tested on the Melbourne circuit. George Russell secured pole position, with Lewis Hamil...

item.title: Winnipeg Jets defeat Vancouver Canucks 3-2 in overtime with Morrissey’s game-winning goal
item.description: In a closely contested matchup at the Bell MTS Place, the Winnipeg Jets managed to edge past the Vancouver Canucks with a 3-2 victory in overtime. The decisive goal was scored by defenceman Josh Morri...

item.title: US Requests Sri Lanka to Keep Iranian Crew and Survivors Amid Naval Conflict
item.description: The United States has formally urged the Sri Lankan government not to repatriate survivors from the Iranian warship IRIS Dena, which it sank in the Indian Ocean near Galle, as well as the crew of a se...

item.title: Senior Kenya Kwanza figure linked to alleged illegal foreign recruitment network
item.description: The Nation Africa article reports that a senior Kenya Kwanza government official is being linked to a suspected illegal foreign recruitment racket that has drawn national attention. The story says int...

item.title: Public hearings underway in Johannesburg to probe possible political interference in TRC prosecutions
item.description: The Khampepe Commission of Inquiry has commenced public hearings in Newtown, Johannesburg, as of Friday, 6 March 2026. The purpose of this inquiry is to investigate whether political interference play...
